tluaReturnPackUnion.tlua(24,7): error TLUA2322: Type '() => boolean | (number, string)' is not assignable to type 'nil'.


==== tluaReturnPackUnion.tlua (1 errors) ====
    // A union of return packs: the callee returns either a value or an error,
    // never both. Each constituent is an explicitly parenthesized pack.
    declare function parse(s: string): (number, nil) | (nil, string)
    
    local value, err = parse("12")
    
    // Each name still projects positionally out of the union.
    local v: number | nil = value;
    local e: string | nil = err;
    
    // The whole signature round-trips through the printer.
    local sig: (s: string) => (number, nil) | (nil, string) = parse;
    
    // A non-pack constituent mixed with a pack constituent.
    declare function maybe(): (number, string) | nil
    local m = maybe();
    
    // A pack constituent mixed with a scalar (`boolean`) round-trips regardless of the
    // union's display order: any-position parsing accepts a pack in any spot, so whatever
    // order the printer prints the constituents in re-parses cleanly. The error message
    // below pins the spelling.
    declare function packOrScalar(): (number, string) | boolean
    local reparse: (s: string) => (number, string) | boolean = packOrScalar;
    local mustError: nil = packOrScalar;
          ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '() => boolean | (number, string)' is not assignable to type 'nil'.
